children.heading: Regulation by States, political subdivisions, State and local agencies, and franchising authorities
children.label: a Regulation by States, political subdivisions, State and local agencies, and franchising authorities
children.text: Nothing in this subchapter shall be construed to affect any authority of any State, political subdivision, or agency thereof, or franchising authority, regarding matters of public health, safety, and welfare, to the extent consistent with the express provisions of this subchapter.

children.heading: State jurisdiction with regard to cable services
children.label: b State jurisdiction with regard to cable services
children.text: Nothing in this subchapter shall be construed to restrict a State from exercising jurisdiction with regard to cable services consistent with this subchapter.

children.heading: Preemption
children.label: c Preemption
children.text: Except as provided in , any provision of law of any State, political subdivision, or agency thereof, or franchising authority, or any provision of any franchise granted by such authority, which is inconsistent with this chapter shall be deemed to be preempted and superseded.section 557 of this title

children.heading: “State” defined
children.label: d “State” defined
children.text: For purposes of this section, the term “State” has the meaning given such term in .section 153 of this title
